creator: bofh@terranova.net
text:
Status is unchanged and the patch from Cy Schubert in late July 2008 is
not currently in the ntp/ntp-devel ports.

I just tested plain unmodified ports/ntp-devel under FreeBSD
7.1-RELEASE-p4 on an amd64 machine:

Mar 26 13:54:51 <ntp.notice> XXXX ntpd[4816]: ntpd 4.2.5p158@1.1809-o
Thu Mar 26 17:53:08 UTC 2009 (1)
Mar 26 13:54:52 <ntp.err> XXXX ntpd[4817]: mlockall(): Resource
temporarily unavailable


And ports/ntp under FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE-p4 amd64:
Mar 26 14:00:45 <ntp.notice> XXXX ntpd[30704]: ntpd 4.2.4p6@1.1549-o Thu
Mar 26 18:00:03 UTC 2009 (1)
Mar 26 14:00:45 <ntp.err> XXXX ntpd[30705]: mlockall(): Resource
temporarily unavailable


Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> What's the status on this one? Is the problem still present in recent
> revisions of ntp-devel port?
>
